title: Behavior Stomp Attack
description: Allows the mob to use the polar bear's melee attack.

attack_once.description: Whether the entity attacks only once per engagement.

attack_types.description: Specific attack types this stomp attack is restricted to.

random_stop_interval.description: Maximum number of ticks the entity can chase before stopping.

reach_multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the stomp reach distance.

speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier while chasing the target.

track_target.description: Whether the entity tracks its target when out of sight.
